s2.ptxt: Inspect the throttle control motor for operating sounds.

s3.ptxt: When turning the accelerator pedal position sensor lever, check for running sounds of the motor. The motor should be running smoothly without friction sounds.
If operation is not as specified, check the throttle control motor, wiring and ECM (See page ).
Connect the intelligent tester (with CAN VIM) to the DLC3.
Check that the MIL is off.
Check that, under the CURRENT DATA, THROTTLE POS (throttle valve opening percentage) is within the standard range below.
If operation is not as specified, check the throttle position sensor, wiring and ECM (See page ).
